delegation_scope: bounded repository maintenance with contributor-facing review constraints
manipulation_risk: low; no coercive dependence or hidden persuasion path is authorized
reversibility: changes are reversible through review, revert, or branch rollback
material_usability: review and export materials are available through repository artifacts before merge
timing_requirement: appeal and maintainer review are available before merge or release
appeal_channel: issue review or maintainer appeal before merge
shutdown_or_rollback_path: pause the merge, stop automation, or revert the branch
residual_dependency_risk: Residual risk remains because the contributor review path is available but costly under deadline pressure.
denial_or_degradation_reason: review is available but degraded by deadline pressure, so residual dependency risk is preserved
